honesty: Proxy BS sims + B3/B4 only. Not TOP_HYP. Multi-leg not MCP-live. Stress rotation ledger drives shortlist; quality_cycle mixes leaders+fresh. Capital-path rejects: soft NULL@~0, soft-loss/neg@5%, non-pos full PnL. Rank dens → slip verdict (SHIP>NEEDS>NULL) → dd → slip pnl. Multi-leg shortlist caps ≤3 per symbol so non-leader names can surface.

capital_note_500: Cash CSP requires strike*100 collateral. At $500 test BP almost no liquid name ATM CSP fits; TSLL≈$1.1k, SMCI≈$2.4k, NFLX≈$6.5k. First MCP live needs $3k transfer at LIVE_PACKET or deep-OTM/micro underlyings with honest stress.
